name: I-Tranexamic Acid (TXA)
description: I-Antifibrinolytic ejenti evimbela ukuqhekeka kwamahlule egazi. Kunciphisa kakhulu ukufa okubangelwa ukushaqeka okubangelwa ukopha lapho kunikezwa kusenesikhathi. Kunconywe i-CoTCCC kubo bonke abalimele abopha kakhulu noma abasengozini yokopha okukhulu.
indications: Ukopha okukhulu kwangaphandle noma okusolwayo ngaphakathi
dose: I-1g IV/IO ngaphezu kwemizuzu eyi-10, ilandelwa yi-1g IV/IO ngaphezulu kwamahora ayi-8. Uma i-IV/IO ingatholakali: 650mg PO x2 (1.3g inani) -- Inketho ye-TCCC PO.
window: KUMELE inikezwe kungakapheli amahora ama-3 okulimala. Ngaphansi kwamahora angu-3, ​​i-TXA INGAKHULISA izinga lokufa kwabantu -- unganikeli.
warnings: Isikhathi sokungena ngemvume ngokushesha -- iwindi amahora angu-3 kusukela ngesikhathi sokulimala, hhayi isikhathi sokufika.

pediatric.dose: 15 mg/kg IV (ubukhulu obungu-1g). Ubufakazi obuvelayo -- sebenzisa ukwahlulela komtholampilo.

obstetric.note: Ikhonjiswe ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha. Kuphephile ekukhulelweni. Umthamo ofanayo womuntu omdala uyasebenza.

source: JTS CPG: Hemorrhage Control / CoTCCC TCCC Guidelines
